_comment: Banco de respuestas por substring. 'q' = trozo unico de la pregunta; 'a' = trozo unico de la opcion correcta. El resolvedor compara en minusculas e ignora etiquetas HTML. Si la pregunta no se captura, cae a match por 'a'. Las preguntas de encuesta (satisfaccion/recomendacion) y el feedback NO van aqui: se resuelven automaticamente. Amplia este banco con cada curso nuevo, o usa --resolver bank+llm para que un LLM resuelva las desconocidas.

knowledge.a: AI assistant that can help with writing

knowledge.q: data can Claude access through connectors
knowledge.a: Only data you have permission to access

knowledge.q: complete the initial setup before team members
three elements make up an effective prompt
knowledge.a: Setting the stage, defining the task
Add more details about your audience
AI that takes action to complete goals

knowledge.q: recommended workflow for using Claude Code

knowledge.a: reads it automatically at the start of every session
max tokens limit, and a list of messages
Your code runs it and sends the result back

knowledge.q: context management matter for long-running agents
knowledge.a: you pay for what's in it

knowledge.q: best fit for a managed agent
invokes the built-in skill for working with the Claude API
